commands.text: We... we made it...
Yeah! Barely! Did you see how close that was!?
This place looks even worse than Firsta...
I-I hate how you say that like it's a normal thing! This is NOT normal!
Everyone, stay close to me.
Ooh, look at that! Sora's trying to sound all brave and leader-like!
I AM brave, Zuko. I have to be.
Sure, sure! Whatever you say, Captain!
W-Why is everyone in this village running around screaming?! This is bad... This is really bad!
Because they're scared, Gin. Just like us.
That... that does NOT help my anxiety, Ann!
It looks like nobody knows what to do.
Well, yeah! Nobody expected us to show up with a giant disaster right behind us!
Sora. You did really good back there.
I was still scared...
It's okay. We were all scared.
I still do not understand the mathematical probability of how we survived that!
Because Sora had a cool sword, obviously! Whoosh! Swish!
A-a sword is NOT supposed to be the only reason we are alive! That's statistically terrifying!
Well, it was! So deal with it!
It was just luck, guys.
No way! It was all you, man!
Seriously, if you didn't hold that ugly thing off, we would've been totally flattened!
T-then... how do we kill them?
BAHAHA! Wow! You went from 'they are fake stories' to 'how do we kill them' REALLY fast!
T-that is not the point! Stop laughing!
It is EXACTLY the point! You were just calling us crazy this morning!
I am asking because I am too young to die, Zuko!! I have so many books I haven't read yet!
You could've asked nicely before you hid behind those boxes!
You were acting like a maniac!
Both of you. Stop.
He started it!
You are making my heart rate go up!
I said, I am not asking.
Listen to me, BOTH OF YOU.
What?
*whack*
OWW!
HEY! What was that for!?
Now listen and be quiet.
T-that was a violation of physical boundaries...
The Elementa and The Elementor are not something you beat by yelling or swinging a stick around.
Then how are we supposed to mathematically defeat them?!
We don't.
They don't stay dead. They aren't normal monsters like in your comic books, Zuko.
You can push them back. You can run away from them. But you can't just pretend they're gone forever.
T-then what are we supposed to do?! Hide in a hole?!
We keep moving.
F-for how long?!
No. No, no, wait... You mean we have to run like this FOREVER?!
That's why we were talking about Shii, you big crybaby!
That glowing thing you said was actually real?!
YES! It's super real!
You never even explained what it scientifically is!
I totally did!
You said it like a weird riddle! 'The light inside you'-that means NOTHING to me!
That's because I don't know everything, okay?!
YOU DO NOT KNOW ANYTHING!!
I know enough to keep my legs moving! Unlike you!
Stop it! Shii is... what helps us stay safe inside ourselves.
If we find it, the \C[2]Elementor\C[0] can't break us so easily.
T-that still sounds like a bedtime story...
Then keep calling it a bedtime story! I'd rather chase a story than stand still and get eaten!
Zuko... how exactly do we find it?
Absolutely no idea! HAHAHA!
WHAT?!?!
YOU DRAGGED US OUT OF OUR SAFE VILLAGE AND YOU DO NOT EVEN HAVE A PLAN?!
I never said I had a plan! I just said we needed to go!
\FX<FC, shake>THEN WHY ARE WE EVEN HERE?! I WANT MY BED!!\RX
Gin, breathe! We're here because staying in one place wouldn't have saved us anyway.
And Shii isn't something you can just buy from a shop. It only shows up when you face something you can't run away from.
T-that contradicts everything we are doing! You just said we HAVE to run away!
I know it sounds confusing. But that's why it's hard to find.
I think I am going to throw up...
Gin. You have to choose.
H-huh?
We can stay here and wait to get caught by The \C[2]Elementor\C[0].
Or we keep walking, and we look for Shii together.
T-That is a terrible, poorly constructed multiple-choice question!
Yep! It totally is!
But it's still a choice! Come on!
*wraps arms around Gin and Ann*
You guys have ME, right? I'm the strongest! I won't let any ugly shadow monsters touch you!
You say that with a statistically improbable level of confidence...
Because my muscles are huge!
You don't even have muscles yet, Zuko. You're just loud.
And charming!
You are DEFINITELY not charming.
Ouch. My feelings.
We should go now.
*sniff* I really, really do not like this...
WE KNOW!
We really know, Gin.
Hey, you kids! Be careful over there!
The water is getting deeper again! It's not safe!
Oh, great. Giant puddles.
W-why are you saying it like that...?
Gin...
W-what?
You look really pale. Are you okay?
I am logically assessing the water levels! And I am always pale!
No, you're shaking. You're scared.
I-I am not! I'm just shivering from the humidity!
You're doing that little squeaky voice again!
I am mad at both of you!
PLEASE! Can someone help us?!
We should go help them.
Yes. They sound desperate.
Whoa, that guy sounded really serious.
EVERYTHING SOUNDS SERIOUS RIGHT NOW!! AHHH!
The flood keeps rising! Some people are stuck near the lower road!
Is there a way for us to get through?
Only if someone can cross the deep water. But the current is too strong for normal people!
*stares at Gin*
W-what? Stop looking at me like that!
Gin. You can cross it.
\FX<FC, shake>I ABSOLUTELY DO NOT WANT TO DO IT!\RX
That makes you the perfect hero for the job! Woo-hoo!
That is the stupidest sentence I have ever heard in my entire life!
If you can get across, there are some supplies trapped there too...
Don't worry, sir. We'll help.
Oh, thank you... thank you so much, kids!
I hate this village! I hate water! I hate everything!
You say that like you haven't been complaining non-stop since we left home!
I HAVE EARNED THE RIGHT TO COMPLAIN, ZUKO!
Gin, can you really cross it?
Y-yes...
I... I think.
That didn't sound confident at all.
\FX<FC, shake>BECAUSE I AM NOT CONFIDENT, ANN!\RX
There's the Gin we know and love!
Shut up, Zuko!
Nice job! Look at him go, so brave, so round!
I will remember this insult forever!
Eh, you'll forget about it in five minutes when you start panicking again.
Statistically... maybe. BUT STILL!
Gin, please be careful.
You saying that does NOT decrease the danger level, Sora!
I know.
But still...
Someone is still trapped under all that wood over there!
Ann, can you reach them from that small gap?
Yes, I can fit! Give me a second!
Stand back! I'll move this big heavy debris! YAAAH!
W-why are you all acting so normal in a catastrophic flood situation?!
Because panicking wastes precious time, Gin.
THAT IS VERY EASY FOR YOU TO SAY!
Nah, it's hard for her too! She just doesn't scream and cry about it like you do!
Zuko, you talk too much.
Yeah, that's also true!
Thank you... thank you so much!
Are you hurt, sir?
Just a few scrapes, but I'm okay now.
Please stay near the higher road. It's safer.
We will. Bless you kids.
Hey, look. There's something floating in the water over there.
Ooh! Something shiny and good, or something gross and awful?
We're in a flooded disaster village, Zuko. It's probably both.
Got it! It's a Memento.
Of course it is. Why wouldn't it be.
It was stuck under the water.
Put it in your bag, Sora. We might need it.
See? I told you getting wet would be useful!
T-that is definitively NOT what I wanted to hear right now!
AAAAH! HELP!!
OVER THERE! Look!
It's an \C[4]Elementa\C[0]! Made of water!
N-no. No, no, no, no, no!
Everyone, stay together!
You hear that, Gin?! That means you are NOT allowed to run away and hide!
I WAS NOT PLANNING TO!
You totally were! I can see it in your eyes!
You don't even know what my eyes look like right now!
BOTH OF YOU, FOCUS! It's coming right at us!
W-why is it splashing at me?! EWW! Make it stop!
Maybe it likes you! You're both squishy!
STOP JOKING AROUND, ZUKO!
I AM TRYING TO HELP!
I'll hold it back! Get ready!
Gin, do something! Use your turn!
\FX<FC, shake>I AM TRYING!! MY HANDS ARE SLIPPERY!!\RX
*pant, pant* It... it stopped?
For now, at least.
Nice! We totally crushed it!
P-please do not say 'nice' like that!
Why not?! We won!
\FX<FC, shake>BECAUSE I ALMOST DIED!!\RX
But you didn't! You're perfectly fine!
THAT IS NOT COMFORTING!!
The path is different now... It's completely blocked.
It's because the water moved all the wood and trash.
Great. Just great. Even the village itself is trying to confuse us now!
I already hate this place so much...
We still need to get the villagers out.
And we have to find a way to the center of the village to get past it.
The center? That usually means big trouble in video games!
That is literally the ONLY correct thing you have ever said, Zuko!
Wow, rude! Insulting the hero?
Zuko, stop posing and move that heavy crate.
I know, I know! I was going to!
You were just standing there.
I was... thinking! Mentally preparing my muscles!
About what?
About... the best angle to push the crate from!
Sure you were.
THE WATER-! WATCH OUT FOR THE WATER!!
Whoa! What is that?!
No way...
Uh, guys? That is definitely NOT a normal flood.
I-I do not like the way this is mathematically accelerating!
No.
No, no, no. Absolutely not.
It's... an \C[2]Elementor\C[0]...
It's really here.
Gin.
P-please do not say my name like that, Ann!
We need to move NOW.
I AM VERY AWARE!
Hey Gin, weren't you the one asking how to beat them earlier!?
I TAKE IT BACK!! I WAS BEING HYPOTHETICAL!!
\FX<FC, shake>Too late! Run!\RX
Stay close! Don't let the water pull you in!
Heh... This is starting to feel like a bad memory already!
\FX<FC, shake>Zuko, for once in your life, STOP TALKING AND RUN!\RX
Gin? Why did you stop?!
Gin, what is it?
There is... something here.
What kind of 'something'?
I... I do not know...
That... looks exactly like me.
Whoa! That's it! That's your Shii, Gin!
Gin... it's yours.
M-me? Why me first?
Go on, Gin. Touch it.
It's too bright... w-what if it burns?
You can do it, scaredy-kid!
I do not know if I can...
We are right here with you, Gin. We promise.
Please do not explode...
It won't.
Wow... It feels...
Like fresh air. Like... I can actually breathe normally again.
HA! Look at that! Gin actually got his Shii first! Who would have guessed?!
I know. I'm actually a little surprised too.
Hmph! Please do not act like I am some kind of legendary hero now.
Oh, don't worry, you aren't! You're still a scared little guy to me!
HEY!
But you still did it, Gin. You survived.
I... I guess I did.
Come on, Gin. Let's get out of this village with us.
I... I do not think I can, Sora.
What? Why?
It feels like... I should stay here.
Like this place is holding me here. The Shii... it's telling me I need to stay.
Wait, but... you aren't shaking anymore. You're not scared.
I am not.
Not of the Elementor.
Not of the \C[4]Elementa\C[0] either.
That part of my brain... it finally feels quiet now.
Then... I guess it is okay.
What?
You can stay here for now. If you feel safe.
We will come back for you, Gin.
Yeah! After we get all of our Shii, we'll come back and grab you!
You... statistically promise?
Yes. We promise.
You don't need to be afraid of the water or the monsters here anymore. Your Shii will protect you.
Okay.
Don't get too comfortable reading books without us, okay!?
You say that like I would actually miss your screaming, Zuko.
Oh, you totally would!
Shut up.
Take care of yourself, Gin. Don't do anything reckless.
I am never reckless. You too, Ann.
We will be back soon.
I know you will.
Come on, guys.
Yeah.
Let's go.
Good luck.
You too, Gin.
